original: Your egg has grown bigger and bigger, now stretching your

so thoroughly that you look positively gravid. It feels wonderful, when you’re not complaining about your back or struggling through doors - the feeling of your belly stretched out around the sheer size of the egg, the way it moves around inside you - it’s constantly bathing you in pleasurable sensations.

Your movements have slowly begun to feel... sluggish. Like your body weighs a little more than it should. You’ve also been craving foods that are high in protein lately, and you’ve been drinking a lot more water than usual recently. \n\nYou consider the possibility that maybe you’re just craving foods and you’re more dehydrated than you realize, but you know that, so soon from your coupling with [frostwyrm.name], it’s better to assume that you’re good and pregnant. Still, no need to panic yet; just keep doing what you’re doing. You’ll know for sure in a couple days.

Lately you’ve been feeling a little... different. Not in a bad way, exactly, but not always in a good way either. Your mood sometimes swings pretty wildly, from joyful and expressive, to angry and borderline destructive, to horny and lustful, to everything in between. But the words for those emotions don’t really do them justice; what you truly feel is much more... primeval. Raw. Unfocused. You knew to expect mood swings with pregnancies, but this is still different. Sometimes, you don’t feel like you’re completely in control of yourself or your feelings. You suppose it must be because of your little passenger; [frostwyrm.name] told you that it already had psionic powers, and that they were growing exponentially every day. As if your growing paunch wasn’t bad enough, your kip is commandeering your own emotions, too."+({var0}.isLactating()?"":" Your boobs also aren’t getting any larger, and you don’t feel like you’re about to start lactating, so you don’t even get the fun stuff out of this pregnancy.")+" It’s only been fifty days; you still have seventy more, thereabouts, until this thing is out of you.
context: <> <> ParseText("Lately you’ve been feeling a little... different. Not in a bad way, exactly, but not always in a good way either. Your mood sometimes swings pretty wildly, from joyful and expressive, to angry and borderline destructive, to horny and lustful, to everything in between. But the words for those emotions don’t really do them justice; what you truly feel is much more... primeval. Raw. Unfocused. You knew to expect mood swings with pregnancies, but this is still different. Sometimes, you don’t feel like you’re completely in control of yourself or your feelings. You suppose it must be because of your little passenger; [frostwyrm.name] told you that it already had psionic powers, and that they were growing exponentially every day. As if your growing paunch wasn’t bad enough, your kip is commandeering your own emotions, too."+(pc.isLactating()?"":" Your boobs also aren’t getting any larger, and you don’t feel like you’re about to start lactating, so you don’t even get the fun stuff out of this pregnancy.")+" It’s only been fifty days; you still have seventy more, thereabouts, until this thing is out of you.")

original: With a groan, you stop and play your hand over your quite gravid middle. You’re barely a third of the way through your projected pregnancy duration and sure enough, just as you’d feared, you look ready to pop. Indeed, you’re growing increasingly paranoid about bumping into things or pitching over outright -- this egg hasn’t exactly given you a lot of time to adapt! Due to your gravid size, getting around is going to be more difficult -- and probably for quite a while yet. But hey, there’s at least one upside: your stomach is tender and stretched, but not only has it not hurt at any point during this process, but it actually feels kind of good. Your [pc.cunt] is also growing more tender, and if your mind wanders to even the least erotic of thoughts, wetness beads down your thighs like "+("half-ausar"===pc.originalRace?"you were":"an ausar")+" in heat. Damn, just thinking about it makes you horny! It’s hard not to wonder how good it would feel to get railed while your tummy’s this full. You ought to find a couple of big, beautiful dragon-women to really lay into you... hands all over your baby bump, kissing over every inch of your stomach while their knotted cocks plug your quim full of their rich seed... Okay, [pc.name], calm down there!
context: <> ParseText("With a groan, you stop and play your hand over your quite gravid middle. You’re barely a third of the way through your projected pregnancy duration and sure enough, just as you’d feared, you look ready to pop. Indeed, you’re growing increasingly paranoid about bumping into things or pitching over outright -- this egg hasn’t exactly given you a lot of time to adapt! Due to your gravid size, getting around is going to be more difficult -- and probably for quite a while yet. But hey, there’s at least one upside: your stomach is tender and stretched, but not only has it not hurt at any point during this process, but it actually feels kind of good. Your [pc.cunt] is also growing more tender, and if your mind wanders to even the least erotic of thoughts, wetness beads down your thighs like "+("half-ausar"===pc.originalRace?"you were":"an ausar")+" in heat. Damn, just thinking about it makes you horny! It’s hard not to wonder how good it would feel to get railed while your tummy’s this full. You ought to find a couple of big, beautiful dragon-women to really lay into you... hands all over your baby bump, kissing over every inch of your stomach while their knotted cocks plug your quim full of their rich seed... Okay, [pc.name], calm down there!")

original: ERROR: Status effect “Ilaria Pregnancy Ends” does not exist!
This was an erroneous pregnancy and the issue has been corrected.

At long last, in a sweaty daze of utter exhaustion, you’re looking down at your tiny children, curled up in your arms "+({var0}.isLactating()?"nursing hungrily on your [pc.boobs]":"and whining hungrily")+". They’re "+({var2}.isAusar({var2})?"full ":"half-")+"ausars, and as predicted, you’ve given birth to "+{var4}.numToText({var3})+" of them, all safe and sound. Their coloration definitely reminds you of Ilaria, who deserves an email after all this, you suppose.
context: <<POS:36489989>> <<VARS:var0=pc,var1=!0,var2=pc,var3=t,var4=Ot.m>> output("\n\nAt long last, in a sweaty daze of utter exhaustion, you’re looking down at your tiny children, curled up in your arms "+(pc.isLactating()?"nursing hungrily on your [pc.boobs]":"and whining hungrily")+". They’re "+(pc.isAusar(!0)?"full ":"half-")+"ausars, and as predicted, you’ve given birth to "+Ot.m.numToText(t)+" of them, all safe and sound. Their coloration definitely reminds you of Ilaria, who deserves an email after all this, you suppose.")

original: You spend a little time with the newborns first, cleaning them and playing with their cute pointed toes and brushing their nascent fur, drawing little whinnies and whines out of them. Tiny "+({var1}.isAusar({var0})?"paw-":"")+"hands touch your face and chest, exploring the world despite their blindness. Eventually, though, reality intrudes. With a heavy heart, you call up the incubation drone, which arrives altogether too fast, and carefully load the newborn pups into its protected belly. You watch the shuttle disappear, comforting yourself with the knowledge that you’ll be able to see them again soon at the Nursery.
context: <<POS:36490451>> <<VARS:var0=!0,var1=pc>> output("\n\nYou spend a little time with the newborns first, cleaning them and playing with their cute pointed toes and brushing their nascent fur, drawing little whinnies and whines out of them. Tiny "+(pc.isAusar(!0)?"paw-":"")+"hands touch your face and chest, exploring the world despite their blindness. Eventually, though, reality intrudes. With a heavy heart, you call up the incubation drone, which arrives altogether too fast, and carefully load the newborn pups into its protected belly. You watch the shuttle disappear, comforting yourself with the knowledge that you’ll be able to see them again soon at the Nursery.")
